pi_items.source: setup_task.sh writes this expected path into the task description and verifier.py verifies output exists at this path.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates and saves the XML to this file path.
Generated XML in setup_task.sh explicitly assigns ResourceUID 1 (Alice Johnson) to TaskUIDs 3 and 4, and ResourceUID 5 (Emma Davis) to TaskUIDs 8 and 9.
The XML generated in setup_task.sh contains exactly 11 <Task> elements (UIDs 0 to 10). The verifier parses only 10 tasks with valid start dates. Both are less than the claimed minimum of 12.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically generates a synthetic Microsoft Project XML file at /home/ga/Projects/construction_retrofit.xml. Verified conflicts exist for Alice Johnson (assigned to parallel tasks 3 and 4) and Emma Davis (assigned to parallel tasks 8 and 9). The expected output location is /home/ga/Projects/leveled_project.xml. The metadata claim of 'min_task_count: 12' is contradicted by the generated file, which has only 11 tasks total (and only 10 with valid start dates).
